document.name: Church Street School for Music & Art — Kids Classes
document.shortDescription: Downtown Tribeca community arts school with progressive Explore! music and art for toddlers through preschool, after-school studio art and Creative Arts Club, instrumental lessons, and teen portfolio programs.
document.longDescription:
Church Street School for Music & Art (CSSMA) is a downtown Manhattan community arts school at 41 White Street in Tribeca. Its official programs hub lists open registration for Spring, Summer, and Fall 2026 semesters across private and group instrumental lessons, early childhood classes, after-school studio art, teen programs, vacation programs, and summer intensives.

The early childhood page describes the Explore! series for ages 16 months through 5 years, including caregiver-and-me Explore! Music I and Art I for toddlers, Explore! Music II and Art II for ages 3–5, and Explore! Piano for ages 4–5, emphasizing hands-on music and art experiences.

The after-school page lists weekday afternoon options for ages 5–12, including 60-minute studio art and improv classes and the three-hour Creative Arts Club (3:00–6:00 p.m.), plus portfolio development for ages 12–18 and private art lessons from age 5. The programs page notes prorated semester pricing and registration by phone 212.571.7290 or email info@churchstreetschool.org.

This listing image is an official school photograph from CSSMA’s Wix-hosted early childhood media, re-uploaded to ImgBB for ClassScout storage policy compliance.

Sources: https://www.churchstreetschool.org/ https://www.churchstreetschool.org/programs https://www.churchstreetschool.org/earlychildhood https://www.churchstreetschool.org/afterschool
document.announcementDescription: CSSMA’s programs page lists ongoing registration for 2026 semesters — call or email to enroll.
